hero.label: Барбер · Варна · BG
hero.lead: Стрижки, оформление бороды и уход — для мужчин, женщин и детей. Онлайн-запись без ожидания.

services.title: What I do.
services.sub: Every appointment includes consult, wash, cut and styling. No upsells, no hidden add-ons.

items.name: Kid's Haircut (6–10 y.o.)
items.desc: Consultation, wash, precise haircut, blow-dry and styling.

items.name: Men's Haircut
items.desc: Consultation, wash, precise cut and contouring, eyebrow shaping, nose and ear waxing, styling and home care tips.

items.name: Men's Long Hair Haircut
items.desc: Careful shaping and maintenance of long hair. Includes consultation, wash, cut and styling.

items.name: Men's Haircut & Hair Camouflage
items.desc: Precise haircut combined with camouflaging grey or thinning hair. Includes consultation, wash, cut, camouflage and styling.

items.name: Express Beard Refresh
items.desc: Quick beard trim, shaping and moisturizing for a clean, well-groomed look.

items.name: Royal Beard Shaping
items.desc: Premium beard shaping with attention to detail. Includes face patches, hot towels, eye mask and waxing.

items.name: Royal Shave
items.desc: Premium straight razor shave with warm towel preparation, moisturizing and a finishing massage.

items.name: Beard Shaping & Camouflage
items.desc: Professional beard shaping with grey hair camouflage for a fresh, well-kept look.

items.name: Express Complex
items.desc: Haircut and beard shaping combined — perfect for the busy man who wants a fresh, groomed look.

items.name: Bald Complex
items.desc: Professional beard shaping combined with a classic head shave. Includes skin care and high-quality products.

items.name: Royal Complex
items.desc: Full grooming package with precise haircut, beard shaping and additional services for a polished look.

items.name: Haircut, Camouflage & Beard Shaping
items.desc: Complete package with haircut, grey hair camouflage and beard shaping.

items.name: SPA Complex
items.desc: Luxury package with haircut, beard shaping, facial care and relaxing treatments.

items.name: Facial Therapy
items.desc: Add-on. Professional facial care with hydrating and nourishing treatments.

items.name: Patches
items.desc: Included in: Haircut, Beard Shaping, Complex.

items.name: Ear & Nose Waxing
items.desc: Included in: Haircut, Beard Shaping, Complex. Add-on.

items.name: Eyebrow Shaping
items.desc: Included in: Haircut, Beard Shaping, Complex. Add-on.

items.name: Head Camouflage
items.desc: Add-on. Concealing thinning hair and uneven areas.

items.name: Beard SPA & Face Care
items.desc: Add-on. Luxury nourishing and relaxing treatments for beard and facial skin.

items.name: Beard Camouflage
items.desc: Add-on. Concealing grey hairs and uneven patches.

cta.title: Готов к новому образу?
cta.sub: Запись онлайн за две минуты. Без звонков и очередей.
